steps.title: Translate 50% to a decimal or fraction
steps.content: The phrase 50% of 640 means we multiply: $0.5 \times 640$. Alternatively, 50% is the same as $\frac{1}{2}$, so we're finding half of 640.

steps.title: Divide 640 by 2
steps.content:
$$640 \div 2 = 320$$
That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
